items.name_cn:
Nude Pink·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory patent leather cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
White Gold Clasp_24cm
#Monogram college#
A timeless messenger bag, a blazing hot 24cm style, a street snap essential, the top choice for many Hollywood stars. It looks good with any outfit, blends seamlessly with any style, looks casual and chic with casual wear, and exudes elegance and luxury with formal wear. A bag suitable for any occasion!! This year's it bag is definitely you!
Model: 392737
Size: 24x17x6cm

items.name_cn:
Burgundy·
LE 37_Mini Bucket Bag
The bucket bag that took the fashion world by storm upon its debut!
Smooth calfskin body with a simple, structured silhouette; it looks structured without being too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature logo new insert buckle, it exudes a unique charm that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 765870
Size: 15x13x6cm
